meta.title: America has a fighter problem... Could new F-16s fix it?
meta.description:
Go to https://winglorespirits.com now to learn more about Winglore's incredible story, their high-quality spirits, and how you can become a part of their growing legend. (Must be 21 or older)


– BREAK –

 today, the U.S. Air Force is facing a growing fighter capacity problem… Or to put that another way, it’s running out of fighters. So, maybe it’s time Uncle Sam got back into the buying Vipers business… 

Let’s talk about whether or not buying new F-16s could help the Air Force meet its fighter capacity needs.
